results.notes: M2 was not produced in 2015 - first model year was 2016
No M3 produced in 2020 - gap between F80 and G80 generations
No M3 produced in 2019 - gap between F80 and G80 generations
No M3 sedan produced in 2014 - gap between E90 and F80 generations
Limited 2007 MY E90 M3 availability - mostly 2008+ for US market
E46 M3 not available in US for 2000 MY - first US year was 2001
No M5 produced for 2024 MY - gap between F90 and G90 generations
No M5 produced for 2017 MY - gap between F10 and F90 generations
No M5 produced for 2011 MY - gap between E60 and F10 generations
No M5 produced for 2004 MY - gap between E39 and E60 generations
